ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the business */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the business location */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Average customer rating (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the business record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the business record was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the business (e.g., restaurant, hotel) */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the business was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the business */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the business */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute record */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Reference to the business */,
  "business_accepts_credit_cards" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business accepts credit cards */,
  "business_parking_garage" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business has a parking garage */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business is wheelchair accessible */,
  "bike_parking" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business offers bike parking */,
  "alcohol" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business serves alcohol */,
  "restaurants_reservations" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business accepts reservations */,
  "happy_hour" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business offers happy hour promotions */,
  "outdoor_seating" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business has outdoor seating */,
  "business_parking_street" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business offers street parking */,
  "business_parking_lot" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business has a parking lot */,
  "wifi" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business offers Wi-Fi */,
  "delivery_service" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business offers delivery services */,
  "takeout_service" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business offers takeout services */,
  "kids_menu" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business offers a kids' menu */,
  "dog_friendly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business is dog-friendly */,
  "catering_service" INTEGER /* Indicates if the business offers catering services */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the attributes were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_attributes_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Reference to the business being reviewed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, app, phone) */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_response" TEXT /* Business's response to the review */,
  "review_response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, business owner, manager) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., preferred language, notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Reference to the business managed */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the manager started managing the business */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the manager ended managing the business (if applicable) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the manager */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the manager is currently managing the business */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the manager's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_managers_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)
